title: UNIQUE Constraint is not enforced
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE main_table (id Int32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE ref_table (ref_id Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
SELECT ref_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ref_table GROUP BY ref_id HAVING count > 1;
key_bug_features: UNIQUE constraint violation on referenced table insertions
